summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Neural Network Builder application. Successfully tested drag-and-drop functionality, layer palette, properties panel, theme toggle, code generation, and most core features. Application is working well with minor UI interaction issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Delete button occasionally blocked by toast notifications
ui_bugs.description: Toast notifications can temporarily intercept clicks on delete button

ui_bugs.issue: Run button becomes disabled during execution and may timeout
ui_bugs.description: Run button disabled state can cause timeout issues during automated testing

passed_tests: Page loads with dark theme by default
Header displays with logo, theme toggle, clear canvas, view code, and run buttons
Layer palette sidebar shows Basic and Advanced accordion sections
Drag Dense layer from palette and drop onto canvas
Drag Input layer and drop onto canvas
Click on node to open properties panel
Edit layer parameters in properties panel
Toggle theme from dark to light mode and back
Click 'View Code' button to see generated PyTorch code
Click 'Download .py' button to download generated code
Copy code to clipboard using copy button
Multiple layer types available in palette
Node connections and visual feedback working
Properties panel shows correct layer information
Code generation produces valid PyTorch structure
